'''Endorian swamp beasts''' lived in the [[Valley of the Lizard Warriors]] on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. They preyed on [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], and other small creatures that lived on Endor.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 4|''Ewoks'' (1985) 4]] {{1st}}
